temporal_description:
(00:00-00:05) A wide shot reveals a desolate, snow-covered mountain village at night. The scene is dark and foggy, illuminated only by a few streetlights. A lone, small figure stands on a snowy hill, looking up towards a large, multi-story wooden building. The building's windows are dark, and the snow on the roofs is thick and uneven. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a mysterious and foreboding atmosphere, introducing the primary setting of the story and a sense of isolation and vulnerability.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A faint, high-pitched scream is heard, followed by a low, ominous musical score that builds tension.)
(00:06-00:07) A second, slightly different figure, appearing to be a child, is now visible on the snowy hill, standing near the first figure. The child also looks up towards the building. (Storyline: The introduction of a second, smaller figure adds a new element to the scene, suggesting the presence of a child and potentially shifting the dynamic of the narrative.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A high-pitched scream is heard again, this time more distinct and clear, accompanied by a tense, rising musical score.)
